title: New Brand 2 Pack Deep Sturdy Muffin Fairy Cake 6 Cup Non Stick Baking Tray Tin for Yorkshire Pudding Pies, Cupcakes, Muffin and Brownies, Carbon Steel
features: ✅PREMIUM QUALITY: Our Muffin Pans are made from high quality 100% food grade and are guaranteed BPA free, microwave, freezer and dishwasher safe and heat resistant to 450°F, they are made to last a lifetime
✅NON-STICK BAKING: Muffin tray has excellent heat regulation properties, So when you follow the recipes accordingly non stick baking is guaranteed

✅FUN & VERSATILE: Not just for Muffin! Can also be used for mince pies, Chocolate Coffee Smoothies,Mini lasagna cups,Baked Oatmeal Cups,Chicken Pot Pie Cups AND SO MUCH MORE!! Great for the whole family
✅CLEANS EFFORTLESSLY : The baking muffin pan cleans effortlessly, and washing the pan by hand is recommended, avoid using metal utensils
description: Product Description Cup Of A Muffin Tray A standard size single cup of a muffin tray is approximately 2.75 by 1.4 inches in size. Every cup of muffin tray is filled about 2/3 of its size so that the muffin could rise to normal size. It is better to use liners instead of greasing the cups of the tray. 2x6Pcs Muffin Tray Muffin tray are used to bake muffins. It is generally a non-stick pan with 6 or 12 holders that hold the muffin for elegant baking. This baking ware is essential element for baking muffins . It is generally used as a non-stick baking pan. Material Of Muffin Tin Generally the muffin tins are made of aluminium, stainless steel, cast iron or silicon but this muffin tin is made of carbon steel that is more reliable and useful. Every cup of muffin tin is coated inside out with a non-stick material. Reliability Of Muffin Tray Yummy appetizers can be made using a muffin tray without using a liner. The joint free end of the cups does not allow the material to seam out. Baking at high temperature does not cause the lower side of the muffin tray to loose its shape.
